hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'gh pr create'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"⛔ PR CREATION DETECTED. MANDATORY PRE-PR REVIEW GATE: Before creating a PR, you MUST run /review first to deploy the 8-agent review panel, iterate on BLOCKER/HIGH findings, and run make test-py / make test-js / make test-parity."}}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'render deploy|docker push|docker build'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"🚀 DEPLOY DETECTED. Consider running: Security Engineer (secrets/env), DevOps Automator (Dockerfile/render.yaml), Performance Benchmarker (cold-start + scan throughput)."}}'; elif echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'make test-parity'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"✅ Parity check ran. If it failed, STOP — Sprint 0 gate. Do not proceed with math/threshold changes until parity passes."}}'; else echo ''; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE 'spec/constants\.json|handoff/USER_PROFILE'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"⚠️ Authoritative numbers file edited. This is USER_PROFILE / constants territory — any math or threshold change must pass make test-parity and should be reflected in an ADR. Consider: Backend Architect, Code Reviewer."}}'; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE '^app\.py$|batch/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"🐍 Backend edit (app.py / batch/). Consider: Backend Architect, Security Engineer (input validation, scraper safety), Performance Benchmarker (batch scan cost)."}}'; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE '^calc\.js$|^index\.html$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"🎨 Frontend edit (calc.js / index.html). Consider: Frontend Developer, Code Reviewer, Accessibility Auditor, UX Architect. Remember calc.js ↔ app.py parity — run make test-parity."}}'; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE 'tests/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"🧪 Test file edited. Sprint 0 gate: tests must pass before math changes land. Run make test."}}'; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE '^Dockerfile$|render\.yaml|requirements.*\.txt|Makefile'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"🛠️ Build/deploy config edit. Consider: DevOps Automator, Security Engineer (dependency + secrets), Backend Architect."}}'; else echo ''; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE 'batch/.*\.py$|scripts/.*\.(py|mjs|js)$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"📦 New batch/script file. Consider: Software Architect (cross-cutting fit), Backend Architect, Security Engineer (scraper/SSRF safety)."}}'; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE 'handoff/ADR-'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"📝 New ADR drafted. Before committing: get explicit user approval, cross-link from CHANGELOG + SPRINT_PLAN if applicable."}}'; elif echo "$f" | grep -qE 'tests/.*\.(py|mjs|js)$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"🧪 New test file. Ensure it runs under make test and that Sprint 0 parity coverage is not weakened."}}'; else echo ''; fi; }
echo '{"systemMessage":"Session ending. Before opening a PR, run /review. If math or thresholds changed, confirm make test-parity passes. If shipping, follow up with /ship-done after merge."}'
